input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #7430 [Automation] java run fails for ognl:ognl:3.3.5; label=fails-java-run; body_chars=8015

risks: Existing deep tests exercise deprecated SecurityManager behavior and JDK-internal access handling; those may need guarded assertions or local test JVM arguments if retained, but this is test design rather than pre-generation setup.
The observed javaTest failure against 3.3.5 appears to be an assertion/behavior drift in an existing ObjectPropertyAccessor fallback test, not a missing dependency or external service.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: OGNL is a standalone expression/property-access library; its only runtime dependency for 3.3.5 is transitive org.javassist:javassist:3.29.0-GA, so meaningful tests can use ordinary POJOs and the public Ognl/OgnlRuntime APIs without extra Maven dependencies, Docker services, or required global environment setup.
